sections.entity:
<Entity id="ad1e7a73-26fc-44f9-aabc-ae1eaac0de1e" patternsProximity="300" recommendedConfidence="85" relaxProximity="false">
<Pattern confidenceLevel="85">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_domestic_violence_order_application_dvo_reference_number_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_domestic_violence_order_application_primary_keywords_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_domestic_violence_order_application_classification_markers_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_domestic_violence_order_application_corroborative_terms_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_domestic_violence_order_application_dvo_terms_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_domestic_violence_order_application_dfv_act_reference_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_domestic_violence_order_application_exclusion_domestic-violence-order-application" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="75">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_domestic_violence_order_application_dvo_reference_number_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_domestic_violence_order_application_primary_keywords_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_domestic_violence_order_application_exclusion_domestic-violence-order-application" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="65">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_domestic_violence_order_application_dvo_reference_number_domestic-violence-order-application" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_domestic_violence_order_application_exclusion_domestic-violence-order-application" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
</Entity>

resources:
<Resource idRef="ad1e7a73-26fc-44f9-aabc-ae1eaac0de1e">
<Name default="true" langcode="en-us">TestPattern - Domestic Violence Order Application</Name>
<Description default="true" langcode="en-us">Detects domestic violence order applications and conditions under the Domestic and Family Violence Protection Act 2012 (Qld). These documents contain details of aggrieved persons, respondent details, allegations of domestic violence, ouster conditions, and protection order terms. Disclosure could endanger the aggrieved person.</Description>
</Resource>
